title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.055 - Errors in members or providers receiving more or less than entitled to — board's power to correct or recover overpayments
text:
103.055.  Errors in members or providers receiving more or less than entitled to — board's power to correct or recover overpayments. — Should any error result in any member or provider receiving more or less than he or she would have been entitled to receive had the error not occurred, the board shall correct such error, and to this end may recover any overpayments.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 1 subsec. 22)
